nasb.text: I will gather you and blow on you with the fire of My wrath, and you will be melted in the midst of it.

esv.text: I will gather you and blow on you with the fire of my wrath, and you shall be melted in the midst of it.

cnv.text: 我必集合你們，把我烈怒的火吹在你們身上，你們就必在城中熔化。

ccb.text: 我要聚集你们，把我的怒火倒在你们身上，熔化你们。
